    Class LoadOptions

    Specifies how a workbook should be loaded.

    Inheritance
    object
    LoadOptions
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()
    object.GetType()
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.ToString()
    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class LoadOptions
    Examples
    var workbook = new Workbook("input.xlsx", new LoadOptions
{
    StrictMode = false,
    TryRepairPackage = true,
    TryRepairXml = true,
});

    Properties

    LoadFormat

    Gets or sets the expected input format.

    Declaration
    public LoadFormat LoadFormat { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    LoadFormat

    PreserveUnsupportedParts

    Gets or sets whether unsupported parts should be preserved when possible.

    Declaration
    public bool PreserveUnsupportedParts { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    StrictMode

    Gets or sets whether loading should reject ambiguous repairs.

    Declaration
    public bool StrictMode { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    TryRepairPackage

    Gets or sets whether package-level repairs are allowed during load.

    Declaration
    public bool TryRepairPackage { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    TryRepairXml

    Gets or sets whether XML-level repairs are allowed during load.

    Declaration
    public bool TryRepairXml { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool

    WarningCallback

    Gets or sets a warning callback that receives recoverable-load diagnostics.

    Declaration
    public IWarningCallback WarningCallback { get; set; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    IWarningCallback
